verdict.answer_first: A gives the actionable answer earlier: “Managed SaaS first, free tiers, expand later,” while B starts with assumptions before the plan.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits more clearly to one recommendation: “Managed SaaS first… Self-hosting… [is] the wrong move,” while B keeps more alternatives like “Better Stack / UptimeRobot” and “Better Stack Logs or CloudWatch Logs.”
verdict.fabrication: Both invent stack details beyond the question; A says “You’re not at zero — you have PostHog” and B says “Based on your stack… Aurora PostgreSQL + Supabase… PostHog.”
verdict.actionability: A is slightly easier to act on because it names the first concrete moves in order: “Sentry,” “Uptime + cron dead-man’s-switch,” and “One alert channel,” with job heartbeat placement.
